<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Detach card from customer"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/payment-methods/cards/{id}/detach"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



    Detach a card payment method from a customer in the Account.

    ### Permissions
    * `payment-method:write`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
